executable.title: GaussianLPF_nkrchak
executable.description: Performs Gaussian low-pass filter on the input image
executable.acknowledgements: Hans J. Johnson provided starter code and XML file for SimpleThreshold. This builds from SimpleThreshold.xml.

parameters.label: Filter Parameters
parameters.description: Parameters for the Gaussian low-pass filter

double.name: sigma
double.label: Sigma
double.description: Sigma for X, Y, and Z directions for Gaussian low-pass filter
double.constraints:
Sigma for Gaussian LPF is in terms of mm so 5 mm LPF is large and values higher than 5 could lead to heavy blurring <--> Although 0.1 is rather low for sigma in a Gaussian LPF it is chosen to allow the user the ability to explore if a sigma value lower than 0.5 works for their dataset <--> Step size is 0.1 to match the magnitude of the minimum <-->
0.1
0.1
5.0
